TEXT.source: NTU Corpus, Paiwan, Y2 one-minute spontaneous speech; source EAF: Learning languages_yed01 1 min.eaf; anonymized speaker label: yed01

S.FORM: a nu neka saigu a ikai ta aicu a kalic kali kacalisian a kai ui, avan a e e paiwan a kai avan aicu a rukai a kai.
e neka saigu e neka ne neka neka maqati amen a e e kemeljang tu azua rikisi azua cinalivatan na aicu a qinaljan, aicu a caucau.
a sicuayan ui e a tiaken e ini a masalu tu e tjala ikaikai ta aicu a pinaiwanan.
a ku kinemeneman a sicuayan ui mavan a aicu a a tiaken kacalisian aken, a uri e a ku a ku tjara ikai ta aicu a pinaiwanan.
manu e tucu anga, izua ku cavilj,
izua ku aicu a e cinalivatan, kemeljang anga aken.
